FAQ

How quickly can teams launch?

Most teams connect a dataset and start generating insights in under 15 minutes.

Does AURA use external data?

AURA combines your uploaded data with built-in intelligence models for tailored recommendations.

Can I export reports?

Yes. Pro and Enterprise include export-ready reports and API access.

What file types are supported?

CSV, XLSX, PDF, JPG, and PNG are accepted in the data room.

What is the onboarding flow?

Users complete company details, upload a first file, and receive a personalised AI-generated tagline.

Is this premium only?

AURA is built for leadership teams that want a premium, private, in-memory experience with a strong visual edge.

AURA

Premium business intelligence intelligence for modern operators.
